'''Ersheg''' was a continent on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ergeshui/Legends|Ergeshui]], and was the location of the [[City/Legends|cities]] of [[Erglush]] and [[Outworlder City]], which were connected by the [[Living Monorail]]. A [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighter]] from the [[Dark Nebula (Star Destroyer)|''Dark Nebula'']] crashed there.
